articles.title: IOTA, TRX & NEO Complete Pullbacks, Upward Movement Expected
articles.description: IOTA (IOTA), Tron (TRX) & NEO (NEO) have completed fourth wave pullbacks and could soon begin another upward move.

articles.description: Formula One teams from Aston Martin and Alfa Romeo had a photo finish today, with both announcing the launch of crypto fan tokens on the Socios.com platform. The post Aston Martin and Alfa Romeo Become First F1 Teams to Launch Crypto Tokens appeared first on BeInCrypto.

articles.description: Red Bull Racing (RBR) has signed on Tezos, the world’s 42-largest blockchain by market cap, as its Official Blockchain Partner, as per a release this morning. articles.description: On Thursday (May 20), Coinbase announced that it is launching support for Solana ($SOL) on Coinbase Pro, its trading platform for experienced/professional investors. Solana is “an open source project implementing a new, high-performance, permissionless blockchain” that is maintained by the Geneva-based Solana Foundation. Solana protocol was created by Solana Labs, which is backed by investors...

articles.title: Chainlink joins Hedera council in push to link DeFi with traditional finance
articles.description: Chainlink, a data oracle, has joined the Hedera Governing Council, which oversees the distributed governance of the Hedera network, an enterprise-grade public network for the decentralized economy.

articles.title: Judge denies Ripple’s bid to bar SEC from seeking foreign info on XRP
articles.description: In a win for the SEC, a judge knocks back Ripple’s request to stop the SEC from asking foreign regulators for info on Ripple and XRP transactions overseas.

articles.title: JPMorgan says investors fleeing to gold after Bitcoin dipped to near $30,000
articles.description: Institutional investors are turning away from Bitcoin amid the latest massive sell-off on the crypto market—and allocating their capital back in gold, according to a note written by research analysts at American investment bank JPMorgan Chase.

articles.title: #Binance Loans Adds Collateral Assets $ADA, $BCH & $UNI

articles.description: The latest victim in the wave of flash loan attacks targeting the decentralized finance (DeFi) industry is one of its largest players — PancakeBunny. The post PancakeBunny Attacked With Massive $200M Flash Loan Exploit appeared first on BeInCrypto.

articles.title: VeChain (VET) verifies results of a 305 metric tonne plastic clean-up in the ocean
articles.description: ReSea Project, a Danish company with a community-driven solution to remove plastic from oceans and rivers in Indonesia, shared their Cleanup Impact Status on Linkedin yesterday, stating they cleared 305 metric tonnes of plastic waste from the ocean and verified the results using VeChain.
